title: Submit your contribution
subtitle: Choose the task your activity refers to, tell us what you did, and upload the required evidence. Your contribution will be validated by a judge to ensure accuracy and transparency.

errors.noTasks: This challenge has no tasks defined yet.
errors.notAuthenticated: You must be logged in to submit a contribution.
errors.noTaskSelected: Please select the task your contribution refers to.
errors.submitFailed: Submission failed. Please try again in a moment.

validation.minPhotos: Please upload at least {{count}} photo as evidence.
validation.minValue: Please enter a valid value for "{{label}}" (minimum: {{min}}).

taskSelect.label: Which objective does your contribution refer to?
taskSelect.hint: Every contribution must be linked to one of the challenge objectives.

activityDescription.label: Activity description
activityDescription.placeholder: Add details about what you did, if you like
activityDescription.hint: Not required, but it helps the judge better understand your contribution.

errors.format: Unsupported format. Use JPG, PNG or WEBP.
errors.size: File is too large. Maximum 10 MB per photo.

km_percorsi.label: How many km did you cycle?
km_percorsi.hint: Enter the total distance cycled to reach the event location.

vehicle_id.label: What transport would you have used otherwise?
vehicle_id.hint: Indicate what you would have used instead of cycling. This is used to calculate avoided emissions.

evidences.label: Photos of your journey
evidences.hint: Upload at least {{count}} photo showing your participation. You can photograph your bike with the scenery or the arrival point.

kg_rifiuti.label: How many kg of waste did you collect?
kg_rifiuti.hint: Indicate the approximate weight of waste collected and properly disposed of.
